USAGE:
Find the characterstics for the given package:
  ossgadget characteristic --download-directory . --format text [options]
  package-url...

  -r, --custom-rule-directory    load rules from the specified directory.

  --disable-default-rules        (Default: false) do not load default, built-in
                                 rules.

  -d, --download-directory       (Default: .) the directory to download the
                                 package to.

  -f, --format                   (Default: text) specify the output
                                 format(text|sarifv1|sarifv2)

  -o, --output-file              (Default: ) send the command output to a file
                                 instead of stdout

  -c, --use-cache                (Default: false) do not download the package if
                                 it is already present in the destination
                                 directory.

  -x, --exclude                  exclude files or paths which match provided
                                 glob patterns.

  -b, --backtracking             Use backtracking regex engine by default.

  -s, --single-threaded          Use single-threaded analysis

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

USAGE:
Diff the given packages:
  ossgadget diff --format text [options] "package-url package-url-2"

  -d, --download-directory    the directory to download the packages to.

  -c, --use-cache             (Default: false) Do not download the package if it
                              is already present in the destination directory
                              and do not delete the package after processing.

  -w, --crawl-archives        (Default: true) Crawl into archives found in
                              packages.

  -B, --context-before        (Default: 0) Number of previous lines to give as
                              context.

  -A, --context-after         (Default: 0) Number of subsequent lines to give as
                              context.

  -C, --context               (Default: 0) Number of lines to give as context.
                              Overwrites Before and After options. -1 to print
                              all.

  -a, --added-only            (Default: false) Only show added lines (and
                              requested context).

  -r, --removed-only          (Default: false) Only show removed lines (and
                              requested context).

  -f, --format                (Default: text) Choose output format.
                              (text|sarifv1|sarifv2)

  -o, --output-location       Output location. Don't specify for console output.

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.

USAGE:
Estimate semantic equivalency of the given package and source code:
  ossgadget reproducible --diff-technique Normalized [options] package-url...

  -a, --all-strategies        (Default: false) Execute all strategies, even
                              after a successful one is identified.

  --specific-strategies       Execute specific strategies, comma-separated.

  -s, --source-ref            (Default: ) If a source version cannot be
                              identified, use the specified git reference (tag,
                              commit, etc.).

  --diff-technique            (Default: Normalized) Configure diff technique.

  -o, --output-file           (Default: ) Send the command output to a file
                              instead of standard output

  -d, --show-differences      (Default: false) Output the differences between
                              the package and the reference content.

  --show-all-differences      (Default: false) Show all differences (default:
                              capped at 20), implies --show-differences

  -l, --leave-intermediate    (Default: false) Do not clean up intermediate
                              files (useful for debugging).

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.
